# OpenAI Spinning Up Source Notice

OpenAI Spinning Up is used as an external reference for this learning lab.

- Website: https://spinningup.openai.com/
- Source: https://github.com/openai/spinningup
- License: MIT

This repository should not become a blind copy of Spinning Up. The intended use
is to read, index, explain, and reimplement the algorithms using modern PyTorch
engineering patterns.

Recommended options:

1. Add Spinning Up as a git submodule when direct source comparison is needed.
2. Keep only this source notice and the upstream license when source checkout is
   not needed.
3. Write local notes under `labs/06_spinningup_track/` instead of modifying the
   upstream source.
